title: taraxacum vidlense
intro: Taraxacum vidlense, also known as the lesser dandelion, is a perennial plant species belonging to the sunflower family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, including its diuretic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum vidlense are attributed to its ability to support liver function, reduce blood pressure, and act as an antioxidant. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum vidlense can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and capsules, which are often used to promote digestive health and alleviate symptoms of arthritis.
